ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team responsible for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_attribute" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the attribute */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_attribute_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_attributeconstraints" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constraint */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute it belongs to */,
  "constraint_type" TEXT /* Type of the constraint (e.g., mandatory, optional) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the constraint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the constraint was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the constraint */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the constraint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_attributeconstraints_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES t_attribute ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_attributetag" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the tag */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_attributetag_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES t_attribute ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_cardinality" (
  "cardinality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cardinality record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with this cardinality */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., one-to-many, many-to-many) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the cardinality record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cardinality record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the cardinality record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cardinality record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardinality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_cardinality_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "t_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each versioning entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the version relates to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project component */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the version */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the version */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of project component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project component */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_versioning_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES t_attribute ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_t_versioning_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., project manager, contributor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the project */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
